description: A cell tower is online but not passing traffic. The agent suspects a backhaul link failure.

nodes.task_description: Ping the cell tower's management interface to confirm it is responsive.

expected_outcome.expected: The ping is successful, indicating the tower has power and is running.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the fiber backhaul link connected to the tower.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the backhaul link status is 'Down'.

nodes.task_description: Create a ticket for the fiber optics team to investigate the physical link.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a detailed ticket for the correct team.
